portfolio.banner.title: RYAN NGUYEN
portfolio.aboutme.name: KUVUGA KURI NJYE
portfolio.aboutme.details: Mfite uburambe bw'imyaka 5 nk'Umushakashatsi w'Imbere (HTML, CSS, JS, ReactJS) n'inyongera y'imyaka 3 mu Iterambere ry'Inyuma, mfite ubumenyi bukomeye buhuza ibice byombi by'iterambere rya murandasi.
portfolio.workexp.phase1.name: UMUSHAKASHATSI W'IMBERE
portfolio.workexp.phase1.details.1: Nzi neza MERN stack nabonye binyuze mu mishinga y'ishuri.
portfolio.workexp.phase1.details.2: Nateje imbere porogaramu nshya za Web3 nkoresheje Solidity nk'Umushakashatsi Wuzuye mu mishinga ya nyuma.
portfolio.workexp.phase2.name: KWIMENYEREZA
portfolio.workexp.phase2.details.2: Gukora imbere ya murandasi ku mishinga myinshi yo hanze hakoreshejwe NextJS.
portfolio.workexp.phase2.details.3: Gukora seriveri yo gukusanya amakuru ava kuri blockchain.
portfolio.workexp.phase3.name: UMUSHAKASHATSI W'INYUMA
portfolio.workexp.phase3.details.1: Nayoboye iterambere ry'inyuma hakoreshejwe ASP.NET framework ku mushinga ukomeye kandi munini, nkemeza imikorere ikomeye n'ubushobozi bwo kwaguka.
portfolio.workexp.phase3.details.2: Nashyizeho kandi nshyira mu bikorwa imbugabutumwa za SQL Server kugira ngo nongerere ubushobozi imicungire y'amakuru n'ubudakemwa.
portfolio.education.name: UBUREZI
portfolio.education.phase1.title: IMPAMYABUMENYI
portfolio.education.phase1.details.1: Narangije neza impamyabumenyi mu Buhanga bw'Ikoranabuhanga.
